ddls:
CREATE TABLE "delivery_methods" (
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery method */,
  "delivery_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery method */,
  "last_edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the delivery method */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery method became valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery method will become invalid */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" REAL /* Estimated time for delivery in days */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the delivery method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the delivery method */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the delivery method belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_methods_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES delivery_method_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_methods_last_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, customer service, logistics manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_method_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Category status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_method_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery method being assigned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being assigned to */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category being assigned to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment will end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Assignment status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_method_assignments_delivery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_method_id") REFERENCES delivery_methods ("delivery_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_method_assignments_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_method_assignments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Product status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Category status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_method_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery method being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the delivery method was used on that date */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of usage on the given date */,
  "average_delivery_time" REAL /* Average delivery time on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_method_usage_delivery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_method_id") REFERENCES delivery_methods ("delivery_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_method_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery method being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., delivery time, cost) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., days, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_method_performance_delivery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_method_id") REFERENCES delivery_methods ("delivery_method_id")
)
